title: Document delivery, security, and v0.1 acceptance status
description: Added public delivery/security documentation, a v0.1 acceptance matrix, and package file scope updates for release-oriented distribution evidence.
decision_notes: TASK-010 is broad, so this slice focuses on making release readiness visible before further code changes.
npm package contents should include public docs/specs/examples but not internal AOF handoff history.
The acceptance matrix records current product decisions, including zone as Add info in the UI while retaining compatibility.
verification: npm pack --dry-run: public docs/specs/examples included; docs/aof excluded
